tasks.subject: Task 1: Scaffold — head, inlined styles, nav, theme bootstrap
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New index.html: preserved <head>, inlined <style> (woff2 fonts + tokens.css minus TTF + styles.css minus .tw-*), #leaf symbol, sticky nav (real icon.png + theme toggle + gated CTA), head theme-bootstrap script, empty <main id=top>.

**Files:** Modify index.html. Reference docs/superpowers/design-source/{PollenPath.html,styles.css,tokens.css}; current head via `git show develop:index.html`.

**Verify:** Serve :8787; curl `app-id=6760616969`=1, `data-launch=pre`=1, icon.png>=1, tw-panel=0, ld+json=1; browser nav + toggle.

```json:metadata
{"files":["index.html"],"acceptanceCriteria":["head preserved verbatim incl JSON-LD + apple-itunes-app","data-launch=pre retained","single inlined style: woff2 + tokens + styles minus tw-*","head theme-bootstrap pre-paint","nav real icon.png + theme toggle + gated CTA","main#top empty + #leaf symbol","no JS errors; toggle persists"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Hero + trust strip
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Hero (headline, lede, pre-launch waitlist CTA, trust pills with stars removed, dual real-screenshot phones home+insights) + trust strip.

**Files:** Modify index.html inside <main>. Reference design PollenPath.html 44-95.

**Verify:** curl "what's in the air"=1, hero-waitlist=1, class="stars"=0, screens=home+insights, screens 200.

```json:metadata
{"files":["index.html"],"acceptanceCriteria":["hero copy matches, .em on feel","CTA gated pre=waitlist live=appstore","pills kept, stars removed","dual framed real phones object-fit cover","trust strip 4 text credits"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Features (rows + card grid) + dark Privacy section
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Two feature rows (real screenshots home/insights), 4-card grid, dark privacy section.

**Files:** Modify index.html inside <main>. Reference design PollenPath.html 97-199.

**Verify:** curl data-phone=0, feature-row=2, privacy=1, 'never leaves your phone'=1.

```json:metadata
{"files":["index.html"],"acceptanceCriteria":["two feature rows framed real screenshots","4-card grid matches design","dark privacy 3 pcards","no data-phone attrs"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Pricing (real prices + toggle) + FAQ
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pricing with real prices (Basic $2.99/$29.99, Pro $7.99/$79.99), monthly/yearly toggle default yearly, '2 months free' badge, USD/region note; FAQ accordion (5, first open).

**Files:** Modify index.html inside <main>. Reference design PollenPath.html 202-296.

**Verify:** curl data-monthly=$2.99&$7.99, data-yearly=$29.99&$79.99, '2 months free'=1, 'Save ~58%'=0, 'varies by region'=1, faq-item=5.

```json:metadata
{"files":["index.html"],"acceptanceCriteria":["three tiers match design","Basic 2.99/29.99 Pro 7.99/79.99 default yearly","badge '2 months free'","price-note USD/region + trial","5 faq-item first open"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: CTA banner + footer + page JavaScript
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Gated CTA banner (id=download), footer (real links, founder quote, Data & Attributions, disclaimer), trimmed body <script> (reveal+nav+billing+theme+waitlist; no phone-builder/tweaks).

**Files:** Modify index.html (CTA+footer after </main>, <script> before </body>). Reference design PollenPath.html 298-373 + app.js; current footer via git show.

**Verify:** curl tweaks=0, app.js=0, id=download=1, privacy-policy.html=1, support@pollenpath.app=1, 'Data & Attributions'=1; browser reveals/nav/toggle/waitlist.

```json:metadata
{"files":["index.html"],"acceptanceCriteria":["CTA banner gated pre/live","footer real links Product/Company/Legal","founder + attributions + disclaimer + copyright","trimmed script reveal+nav+billing+theme+waitlist only","no app.js/tweaks refs"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: CSP hash regeneration + full verification pass
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Regenerate index.html CSP hashes (style + 2 scripts + JSON-LD) in _headers, add data: to img-src, full local verification (CSP clean, no 404s, responsive light/dark + persistence + system fallback).

**Files:** Modify _headers; verify index.html.

**Verify:** Run documented hash one-liner; update style-src/script-src; serve :8787; assets 200; browser devtools no CSP errors, no 404s; resize + theme.

```json:metadata
{"files":["_headers","index.html"],"acceptanceCriteria":["script-src 3 index hashes","style-src index hash + 5 other-page hashes retained","img-src 'self' data:","zero CSP violations","all assets 200","responsive light/dark persist + system fallback"]}
```
